name: Aleprok
short_description: A cooperative survival and strategy game where you explore diverse environments, build and defend your clan town, upgrade weapons and skills, and master magic to survive relentless enemy attacks.
detailed_description:
A FREE ACTION–STRATEGY ADVENTURE

Aleprok is a free action strategy game made by a solo developer. Explore hostile lands, gather resources, build your clan town, and prepare to defend it against relentless enemy attacks.

No ads. No microtransactions. Just jump in and play.

EXPLORE AND PREPARE

Travel through multiple environments, forests, snowy regions, and dead lands, clearing enemy areas, completing tasks, and unlocking new weapons, buildings, and upgrades.

Every expedition strengthens your clan and prepares you for what’s coming next.

DEFEND YOUR CLAN

After exploration comes defense. Enemies will attack your town in waves, targeting your buildings and defenses. Use strategy, positioning, magic, and upgrades to survive.

Your preparation directly affects how long you can hold out.

PROGRESSION AND CUSTOMIZATION

  • Upgrade weapons, buildings, shields, and skills

  • Unlock active and passive abilities

  • Train and evolve a companion with unique forms

  • Use specialized magic to change the flow of battle

CO-OP PLAY

Play together with friends in co-op mode. Build your town, share resources, and defend your clan as a team.

IMPORTANT NOTE

Aleprok uses a simple in-game account (username + password only) to save progress and enable multiplayer features. No email required. No personal data collected.

Aleprok is a passion project and a learning experience. Feedback is welcome and appreciated.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Korean, Polish, Slovak
